# use-local-llm

> React hooks for streaming responses from local LLMs — Ollama, LM Studio, llama.cpp. Zero server required.

## About

use-local-llm is a lightweight TypeScript library that provides React hooks for streaming chat and completion responses from locally-running large language models. It works entirely in the browser via fetch + ReadableStream — no backend proxy or server needed. It supports Ollama, LM Studio, llama.cpp, and any OpenAI-compatible local endpoint. The package is 2.8 KB gzipped with zero runtime dependencies (only `react` as a peer dependency).

- **npm**: https://www.npmjs.com/package/use-local-llm
- **GitHub**: https://github.com/pooyagolchian/use-local-llm
- **Documentation**: https://pooyagolchian.github.io/use-local-llm/
- **Live Demo**: https://pooyagolchian.github.io/use-local-llm/demo/

## Installation

```
npm install use-local-llm
# or
pnpm add use-local-llm
# or
yarn add use-local-llm
```

Peer dependency: `react >= 17.0.0`

## Hooks

### useOllama(model, options?)

Zero-config chat hook for Ollama. Simplest way to get started.

```tsx
import { useOllama } from "use-local-llm";

const { messages, send, isStreaming, abort, clear } = useOllama("llama3.2");

send("Hello!"); // streams response into messages[]
```

**Parameters:**
- `model` (string) — Ollama model name (e.g. "llama3.2", "mistral", "gemma3:1b")
- `options?` (OllamaOptions) — `{ system?, temperature?, endpoint?, onToken?, onResponse?, onError? }`

**Returns:** `{ messages, send, isStreaming, isLoading, abort, error, clear }`

### useLocalLLM(options)

Full-featured chat hook supporting all backends with message history, streaming, and abort.

```tsx
import { useLocalLLM } from "use-local-llm";

const { messages, send, isStreaming } = useLocalLLM({
  endpoint: "http://localhost:11434",
  model: "llama3.2",
  backend: "ollama", // or "lmstudio", "llamacpp", "openai-compatible"
  system: "You are a helpful assistant.",
});
```

**Parameters (LocalLLMOptions):**
- `endpoint` (string) — Base URL of the LLM server
- `model` (string) — Model name
- `backend?` (Backend) — "ollama" | "lmstudio" | "llamacpp" | "openai-compatible" (auto-detected from port if omitted)
- `system?` (string) — System prompt
- `temperature?` (number) — Generation temperature
- `onToken?` (fn) — Called on each token
- `onResponse?` (fn) — Called when response completes
- `onError?` (fn) — Called on error

**Returns (LocalLLMResult):**
- `messages` (ChatMessage[]) — Full conversation history
- `send(content: string)` — Send a user message
- `isStreaming` (boolean) — Whether the model is generating
- `isLoading` (boolean) — Whether a request is in-flight
- `abort()` — Abort current generation
- `error` (Error | null) — Any error
- `clear()` — Clear conversation history

### useStreamCompletion(options)

Low-level hook for streaming text completions (non-chat, single prompt).

```tsx
import { useStreamCompletion } from "use-local-llm";

const { text, isStreaming, start, abort } = useStreamCompletion({
  endpoint: "http://localhost:11434",
  model: "llama3.2",
  prompt: "Explain React hooks in one paragraph.",
});

start(); // begins streaming
```

**Parameters (StreamCompletionOptions):**
- `endpoint` (string) — Base URL
- `model` (string) — Model name
- `prompt` (string) — The prompt to send
- `backend?` (Backend) — Auto-detected if omitted
- `autoFetch?` (boolean) — Auto-start on prompt change (default: false)
- `temperature?` (number)
- `onToken?`, `onComplete?`, `onError?` — Callbacks

**Returns (StreamCompletionResult):**
- `text` (string) — Accumulated response text
- `tokens` (string[]) — Individual tokens received
- `isStreaming` (boolean)
- `start()` — Start/restart the stream
- `abort()` — Abort the stream
- `error` (Error | null)

### useModelList(options?)

Hook to discover available models on a local LLM runtime. Auto-fetches on mount.

```tsx
import { useModelList } from "use-local-llm";

const { models, isLoading, refresh } = useModelList();
// models: [{ name: "llama3.2", size: 2000000000, ... }, ...]
```

**Parameters (ModelListOptions):**
- `endpoint?` (string) — Defaults to Ollama localhost
- `backend?` (Backend) — Auto-detected if omitted

**Returns (ModelListResult):**
- `models` (LocalModel[]) — Available models
- `isLoading` (boolean)
- `error` (Error | null)
- `refresh()` — Re-fetch the model list

## Types

```typescript
type Backend = "ollama" | "lmstudio" | "llamacpp" | "openai-compatible";

interface ChatMessage {
  role: "system" | "user" | "assistant";
  content: string;
}

interface StreamChunk {
  content: string;
  done: boolean;
  model?: string;
}

interface LocalModel {
  name: string;
  size?: number;
  modifiedAt?: string;
  digest?: string;
}
```

## Utilities (Advanced)

```typescript
import {
  parseStreamChunk,
  streamChat,
  streamGenerate,
  detectBackend,
  ENDPOINTS,
  CHAT_PATHS,
  GENERATE_PATHS,
  MODEL_LIST_PATHS,
} from "use-local-llm";
```

- `parseStreamChunk(raw, backend)` — Parse a raw SSE/NDJSON chunk into a StreamChunk
- `streamChat(endpoint, backend, model, messages, options?)` — Async generator yielding StreamChunks for chat
- `streamGenerate(endpoint, backend, model, prompt, options?)` — Async generator yielding StreamChunks for completion
- `detectBackend(url)` — Auto-detect backend from URL port (11434→ollama, 1234→lmstudio, 8080→llamacpp)
- `ENDPOINTS` — Default endpoint configs per backend
- `CHAT_PATHS` / `GENERATE_PATHS` / `MODEL_LIST_PATHS` — API path mappings per backend

## Backend Configuration

| Backend | Default Port | Chat Path | Generate Path |
|---------|-------------|-----------|---------------|
| Ollama | 11434 | /api/chat | /api/generate |
| LM Studio | 1234 | /v1/chat/completions | /v1/completions |
| llama.cpp | 8080 | /v1/chat/completions | /completion |
| OpenAI-compatible | — | /v1/chat/completions | /v1/completions |

## CORS Setup

When calling local LLMs from a browser, you need CORS enabled:

**Ollama:** `OLLAMA_ORIGINS="*" ollama serve`
**LM Studio:** Enable CORS in Settings → Server
**llama.cpp:** Start with `--cors-allow-origin '*'`

Alternatively, use a dev proxy (Vite, Next.js rewrites) to avoid CORS entirely.

## Project Structure

```
src/
├── hooks/
│   ├── useLocalLLM.ts      — Full chat hook
│   ├── useOllama.ts         — Zero-config Ollama wrapper
│   ├── useStreamCompletion.ts — Text completion hook
│   └── useModelList.ts      — Model discovery hook
├── utils/
│   ├── streamParser.ts      — SSE/NDJSON stream parsing engine
│   └── endpoints.ts         — Backend presets and auto-detection
├── types/
│   └── index.ts             — All TypeScript interfaces
└── index.ts                 — Barrel exports
```
